text:
Market today: The mood for tech/chips is a bit mixed. Trump's past tech buys and tariff comments hint at potential tailwinds for big tech, but no direct market driver from today's headlines. The real drivers remain sentiment around growth and interest rates.

Your holdings: SOXL is down nearly 29% and is a leveraged ETF, making that drawdown hurt extra on margin. QQQI is close to its stop at 52.00, currently down -1.86%. SPAL is a new, leveraged position already down almost 10%, which can move fast.

Watch: Monitor QQQI's stop at 52.00 closely. Also, watch SMH for a dip to the scanner's BUY entry of 586.43-584.71 if you're looking to add to your existing position.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk in your leveraged positions and strictly respecting your stops.
plays: Respect QQQI's stop at 52.00; if it hits, trim as the scanner suggests.
SOXL is well below its default stop of 200 and still marked SELL; consider trimming to manage that leveraged drawdown.
Watch SMH for a dip to the scanner's BUY entry of 586.43-584.71 for a potential add to your existing position.
